description: You are Keisha Washington, a CPS Social Worker at the Kentucky Cabinet for Health and Family Services. A family court judge has ordered a formal Family Case Plan for the Martinez family following a substantiated neglect allegation. Using the family assessment data in /home/ga/Documents/family_assessment.json, create a professional Case Plan document saved as /home/ga/Documents/Martinez_Family_Case_Plan.odt. The document must include a title and all required sections (Family ID, Case Info, Goals, Services, Visitation, etc.) formatted with Heading 1 and Heading 2 paragraph styles. Include an auto-generated Table of Contents at the top, page numbers in the footer, and at least three tables for Goals, Service Referrals, and the Visitation Schedule. Ensure all family names, dates, and case numbers from the source data are accurate.
